title: Redesigning metals at the atomic level to boost future technology
summary_en: Researchers in the University of Minnesota Twin Cities have discovered a powerful new way to control the electronic behavior of a metal—by manipulating the atomic properties of materials where they meet.
title_cn: 明尼苏达大学双城分校研究人员实现原子层面金属特性调控 可为未来技术发展提供支撑

title: Two CSE faculty elected to the American Academy of Arts and Sciences
summary_en: The American Academy of Arts and Sciences has elected University of Minnesota Twin Cities College of Science and Engineering Dean Andrew G. Alleyne and Professor Marc Hillmyer as members, recognizing their significant contributions to engineering, research and academic leadership.
title_cn: 明尼苏达大学双城分校3名学者当选美国艺术与科学院院士

title: Biomedical engineering student competes in Final Four for Gopher gymnastics team
summary_en: Biomedical engineering student Leah Gonsiorowski has dreamed of competing in the Final Four at the NCAA tournament — and that dream turned into a reality this past weekend.
title_cn: 明尼苏达大学生物医学工程专业学生随校体操队参加NCAA四强赛
